passives.name: Spelldance
passives.effects: Dealing {{as|magic|magic damage}} or {{as|true|true damage}} damage to an enemy champion grants you {{as|20 '''bonus''' movement speed|ms}} for 4 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Dealing magic or true damage to an enemy champion grants 20 bonus movement speed for 4 seconds.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Spelldance is a self-buff trigger that activates when the owner deals magic or true damage to an enemy champion.
Player-visible behavior: Spelldance grants +20 bonus movement speed for 4 seconds after qualifying champion damage, supporting short chase/reposition windows during spell trades.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
